places.name: Manali
places.description: Snow peaks, Rohtang vibes, and the gateway to Spiti.

places.name: Shimla
places.description: Colonial charm, ridge walks, and cool mountain air.

places.name: Spiti Valley
places.description: High-altitude desert, monasteries, and raw Himalayan beauty.

places.name: Dharamshala
places.description: McLeod Ganj, Tibetan culture, and forested Dhauladhar views.

places.name: Leh
places.description: The heart of Ladakh—markets, palaces, and acclimatization base.

places.name: Nubra Valley
places.description: Dunes, double-humped camels, and dramatic vistas.

places.name: Pangong Lake
places.description: Turquoise waters stretching into the sky—an unforgettable drive.

places.name: Tso Moriri
places.description: High-altitude blue lake surrounded by wild Changthang landscapes.
